description: Style Note Every girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. vishudh considers the street fads that are trending currently and adds it to their latest collection of kurtas. This stylish piece remains ethnic in its cut and silhouette but references contemporary design details to create unique fusion wear. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. Product Details Brown and orange kurta, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, orange lace and tape detail on the chest, short sleeves and side slits. Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
